tagline: Where every meal tells a story

hero.title: Savor the Extraordinary
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted cuisine from locally sourced ingredients, served in an atmosphere of warmth and elegance.

about.heading: Our Story
about.blurb: Founded in 2010, Savora has been a cornerstone of the community, bringing people together over exceptional food and warm hospitality. Our chefs blend traditional techniques with modern creativity to craft dishes that celebrate the finest seasonal ingredients.
about.chefStory: With over 25 years of culinary experience spanning from the trattorias of Tuscany to Michelin-starred kitchens in Paris, Chef Marco Bellini brings a deep passion for Mediterranean flavors and a commitment to farm-to-table excellence. Every dish is a reflection of his journey — rooted in tradition, elevated by innovation.
about.philosophyText: We believe great food starts with great ingredients. We partner with local farmers, fishermen, and artisans to source the freshest, most sustainable products available. Every plate we serve is a celebration of the land and the people who cultivate it.

menu.heading: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A culinary journey through the seasons

items.text: An unforgettable dining experience. Every dish was a work of art, and the service was impeccable.
items.author: Sarah M.

items.text: The tasting menu was extraordinary. Chef Marco personally came to our table to explain each course. A true gem!
items.author: James & Emily R.

items.text: We celebrated our anniversary here and it could not have been more perfect. The ambiance, the food, the wine — all sublime.
items.author: David L.
